seo.title: Image element separator | Creative Lab
seo.description: Manually select an element, isolate it with transparency and download it as a PNG.

product.title: Element separator
product.description: Trace an element, isolate it on a transparent background and download it as a PNG.

steps.selectHelp: Click around the outline. Use several points for a more precise selection.

preview.originalHint: Click over the image to create the outline.
preview.resultHint: The result will have a transparent background.
preview.resultEmpty: The isolated element will appear here.

messages.loaded: Image loaded. Trace the element outline.
messages.error: The image could not be loaded.

info.title: How to separate an element with Creative Lab
info.description: The tool uses a manual point selection to preserve only the marked area and export it as a transparent PNG.
info.stepOneText: Select a PNG, JPG or WebP image.
info.stepTwoText: Place points around the element you want to keep.
info.stepThreeText: Isolate the area and download it as a transparent PNG.
